description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a stylized, almost surreal form. The figure has a humanoid shape with a distinct head, visible facial features, and a body wrapped in a long, tattered coat. The arms are unnaturally extended outward, creating a dramatic, sweeping visual effect, while the legs are also elongated and bent in an unusual manner. The head is slightly tilted, and the figure appears to be in a dynamic, mid-motion pose, as if suspended or leaping. The overall appearance is highly stylized, with rough, painterly textures and a sense of movement frozen in time.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly long limbs, a tattered coat, and a dynamic, mid-motion pose. The figure has a humanoid form with dramatic, sweeping arms and bent legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, tattered coat, and both elongated arms extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the bent, dynamic posture of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the head visible and both arms stretching away from the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elongated limbs and the figure's twisted, dynamic pose.
attribute_clothing_type: long tattered overcoat with loose-fitting pants
attribute_posture: dynamic, mid-motion with arms and legs extended
